response:
Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
Model training and validation are done on-premises, then the model is exported to AWS S3 for deployment. * * *  
Data security and overfitting are critical considerations, with AWS offering encryption and regular audits to ensure model integrity. * * *  
Model deployment involves using AWS SageMaker to host the model, and monitoring is essential to detect any anomalies. * * *
